issue: #2622 — V1 Schema Analysis and Sign-off Criteria (Sections 9 & 10)

schema_analysis.summary: Schema comparison tooling updated to distinguish V1 wire format from V3/model schemas. The V1 API uses receipt_hsh (class_methods.rb) to map v0.24 internal field names back to v0.23.x names, making the V1 wire format backward-compatible.

v1_wire_format.assessment: PASS — No breaking changes for V1 API clients

v3_internal.assessment: Expected — These are internal model changes, NOT visible to V1 clients

warnings_detail.change: Was required, now optional (absent when state=received)
warnings_detail.impact: Behavioral: v0.23 also removed this field in received state

warnings_detail.change: Was required, now optional (absent when state=received)
Was required, now optional (set from opts in receipt_hsh)
Was optional in v0.23, now absent from receipt_hsh output
warnings_detail.impact: V0.23 show_metadata included extra fields not in receipt_hsh

warnings_detail.change: Were optional in v0.23, now absent from receipt_hsh output
warnings_detail.impact: V0.24 show_receipt controller passes through receipt_hsh which doesn't include URLs
warnings_detail.risk: MEDIUM — clients using these optional URL fields will need to construct URLs themselves

bug_found.description: V1 burn response Zod schema declared secret_shortid but Ruby controller sends secret_shortkey (v0.23 name). Fixed in this branch.
bug_found.evidence: apps/api/v1/controllers/index.rb:170 sends :secret_shortkey, integration test (line 249) expects secret_shortkey

checklist_status.static_schema_comparison: DONE — v1-schema-extract.ts updated with V1-specific schemas
checklist_status.review_breaking_warnings: DONE — 0 breaking (V1), 10 warnings reviewed and categorized
checklist_status.zod_vs_ruby_extraction: DONE — tooling available, uses local git refs (no GH CLI needed)
checklist_status.verify_zod_only_fields: DONE — V1 Zod schemas match receipt_hsh output exactly (after secret_shortkey fix)
checklist_status.assess_ruby_only_fields: DONE — receipt_hsh output fully covered by V1 Zod schemas
checklist_status.confirm_v3_fields_absent: DONE — V1 responses use receipt_hsh, not V3 model schemas

items.evidence: 8 failures from diff report categorized into sections 3, 5, 7, 8
Every v0.23.6 endpoint has v0.24.0 equivalent. 37 PASS, 8 FAIL, 0 MISSING.

mappings.metadata_url: Not in receipt_hsh; show_receipt uses metadata_url alias (show_receipt.rb:202)

evidence.note: translate_v1_state (line 37-39) maps v0.24 states back to v0.23 vocabulary. Applied at receipt_hsh line 130.

items.detail: Only 'simple' mode partially tested. 'disabled' and 'full' modes remain unvalidated.

modes.simple: Default mode (lib/onetime/auth_config.rb:24-32). Redis-only auth. Partially tested via integration specs.
modes.full: Rodauth-based auth (auth_config.rb:65). Requires AUTHENTICATION_MODE=full. No V1-specific tests.
modes.disabled: AUTH_ENABLED=false disables auth entirely. No V1-specific tests.

evidence.dual_implementation: session_helpers.rb returns true by default (enabled unless explicitly disabled); auth_strategies.rb requires explicit enabled: true — different defaults
evidence.gap: Need integration tests that exercise V1 endpoints under each auth mode

items.detail: Root cause confirmed: dual implementations with different default semantics. Fix not yet deployed.

evidence.implementation_1: lib/onetime/helpers/session_helpers.rb — returns true by default (enabled unless explicitly disabled)
evidence.note: No rescue false pattern found in current code. The inconsistency is in default behavior, not exception handling.

items.detail: Boundaries exist in code but not documented as a reference.

evidence.rate_limits: Not found in V1 API code — may be handled at middleware/proxy level
evidence.secret_size: Not explicitly bounded in V1 code — limited by Redis max string size and Rack body parsing

items.criterion: Upgrade documentation with V1 API changes

items.notes: Breaking changes documented in v023-vs-v024-comparison.md but not published as standalone

overall_assessment.v1_backward_compat: VERIFIED — 0 breaking changes in V1 wire format
actions_taken: Updated v1-schema-extract.ts to separate V1 wire format from V3/model comparison
Added V024_V1_ZOD_SCHEMAS reflecting actual receipt_hsh output
Fixed V1 burn response Zod schema: secret_shortid → secret_shortkey
Documented all sign-off criteria with file/line evidence
